titleStmt.title: SII 34.174: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 174. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock outside the north prākāra wall of the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājēndra I, 24th year = A.D. 1036.

This records that the sabhā of some brahmadēya village (name lost) in Mīkōṭṭu-nāḍu of Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu sold some land, freed from taxes, for a sum of 42 Rājarājaṉ-paḻaṅkāsu to the temple of Tiruvāṭpōkki-Mahādēva. It is said 4 kāsu was the sale price and the rest the tax capital.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum pOṟceyar
pāvayum cīrttaniccelviyun taṉperuntēviyarāki Iṉ
ntuyarrūḻiyuḷ Iṭatuṟai nāṭun tuṭarvaṉavElippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷi
ccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippāk naṇaṟkkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum po
rukaṭallīḻattarayar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavantēviyar rōṅkeḻil muṭiyum
muṉṉavar pakkal teṉvaṉvaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻama
ṇṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik kēralaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulataṉamākiya pa
lar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkativēlait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palpa
ḻan=tīvum ceruviṟ ciṉavilirupattorukāl laraicu kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mēlvaruñ cān
timaṟṟīvaraṇ Iruttiya cempoṟ tiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil
mutukiṭṭoḷitta jayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu pīṭikai Iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻaraiyila
kkamum navaṉatikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavīrar cakkarakōṭṭamum mutiravaṭavallai
maturai maṇṭalamum kāmiṭa vaḷaṉāṭṭu nāmaṇa kōṇaiyum veñcilaivīrap pañcap paḷḷiyum
pāccaṭaippaḻaṉam mācuṇi tēcamum Āyarvilvaṇkīrtti yāti nakaravaiyic can=tiraṉ tol
kulattin=tirataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu pala tanattoṭum niṟaikulata
ṉakku(k)vaiyum kiṭṭarum ceṟimuṉai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcura cēr ṉaṟkōcalai nāṭun taṉmapālaṉai
vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicōlai taṇṭavuttiyum Iraṇacūraṉai ttākki ti
kkaṇakīrtti takkaṇalāṭamu kōvin=ta cantaṉmāviḻintōṭa taṅkāccāral vaṅkāḷatēcamum
toṭukaṭal caṅkoṭṭar mayipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷiyum Oṇṭiṟal
yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittira neṭukaṭalluttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tī
rttat teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañceluttic caṅkirāma vi
caiyottuṅka paṉmarākiya kiṭārattaraicaṉai vākayam porukaṭalk kum pakkariyōṭum
paṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamum Arttavaṉakanakarp pōrttoḻil
vācalil viccātira tōraṇamum moyttoḷip puṉamaṇi putalvamum kaṉamaṇikatavum
niṟaicīr vicaiyamum tuṟainīrp paṉṉaiyum naṉmalaiyūriṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭal
Akaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā valviṉai Ilaṅkācōkamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māpap
pāḷamum kāvalampuricai vilipaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkōr pukaḻ
talaittakkōlamum kaṭuntiṟal lilāmuritēcamum tēṉakkavār poḻil māṉakkavāramum
toṭukaṭal m māpporu taṇṭārk koṇṭa kōpparakecaripaṉmarāṉa
tavaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 vatu kēraḷāntaka vaḷanāṭṭu mī
kōṭṭu vatamaṅkalattu mūla sabhaiyōm Innāṭṭu tiruvāṭ pō
kki vakku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷ nila ttukkāṇi
yta kkālukku vaṭakkum mūṉṟām catirattil teṟkkillaraiyil mēṟka
ṭaiya muṉpu tiruviḷakkakuppuṟamāka viṭṭa nilam kālukku mēṟkku nilam
kāla ṇṭa rājarājaṉ paḻaṅkācu 4 Ikkācu nālukkum Iṉṉilam kāl
I kku vilaikku viṟṟu poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ce
ytu yōm Innilattukku Iṟaikāvalākak koṇṭa rājarājaṉ paḻaṅkācu
3 10 vilaittirapayamāka koṇṭa kācu nālum Āka kācu 4 10 2 m tiruvāṭ
kki ttiyarāṉ caṇṭēśvaratēva śrīhastattāl kaiccelak koṇṭu Iṉṉila
m kālu tām tiruvāḻppōkki mahātēvar caṇṭēśvara devaṟkku mūlasa
bhai tukku Itu poruḷmāvaṟuti poruṭ cilavOlaiyum vilaiyāvaṇa
mum vum Itu villatu poruḷmāvaṟuti yoru cilavōlai kāṭṭa kaṭavatallalātōmā
ka ttu Ikkācu nāṟppattiraṇṭum koṇṭu Iṉṉilam kālum Ittēvar ca
ku viṟṟukkuṭuttōm sabhaiyōm tiruvaṭipaṇiyālum pāratāyaṉ cā
ṇiyālum cāvāntiēṟaṉāṭ pōkki paṇiyālum Aritaṉ cōmaṉ kēcuvaṉ
rayam Ivai valivatamaṅkalam Uṭaiyāṉ ṉeḻuttu sabhā niyōkattāl kaṇakā
Iruntu kalveṭṭuvittōm kāśiyapaṉ tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇaṉum pāratāyaṉ pātaṉ
ṉanum vācciyaṉ suryadevaṉ vittu vōm
liṅkālilu kkuk kuṟuṇiyum cantirātityaval Ittēvaṟku tiru Arici Iru nāḻikkum kāyamutum
mutum tayir ramutum Āka yiṭṭa nellu Aṟu nāḻikkum Iṭa ñ ceytāṉ kamutūr kiḻavaṉ
nallavur Iṭakkumalai kāṭaṉ māṇikkaṉeḻuttu Itu
śrī māheśvara
Digital edition of SII 34.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
